prestazioni: Engine swap to Mazda's MZR 2.3L DISI Turbo (L3-VDT) from the Mazdaspeed6/MPS, retaining the Shinari's transverse FWD layout but upgraded with a Garrett GTX3582R turbocharger (82mm compressor, 1.06 A/R turbine housing) for 400whp on E85 fuel, paired with a PWR Australia intercooler (450x225x76mm core) and custom 3.5" aluminum piping

Full drivetrain reinforcement including a PPG 6-speed F23MR1 transmission with upgraded synchros, a Spec Stage 3+ clutch (multi-disc, 2600lb clamp load), and a Cusco 1.5-way limited-slip differential with 45% lockup under power

Custom ECU calibration via COBB Accessport (Mazdaspeed6 base map) with custom ethanol flex-fuel tuning by Stratified Automotive Controls, targeting 22psi peak boost, 30° total timing advance, and 12.5:1 AFR on E85, with a secondary map for 93 octane (18psi, 22° timing)
estetica: Full Rocket Bunny V1 Shinari-specific widebody kit (Pandem front bumper, custom fenders with 50mm flares, rear diffuser, and carbon fiber duckbill spoiler), paired with a custom 3M Matte Graphite vinyl wrap with gloss black accents on the roof and mirrors

Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (custom valving for Shinari's 1,500kg weight), adjustable camber plates (Mazdaspeed3 rear upper control arms), and Eibach Pro-Spacer 20mm wheel spacers to fit Work Emotion CR Kiwami wheels (19x9.5 +22 front, 19x11 +30 rear) with Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (255/35/19 front, 295/30/19 rear)

Full interior overhaul with Bride Zeta III reclining bucket seats (Shinari-specific mounting brackets), Takata Drift II 4-point harnesses, a custom MOMO Mod.78 steering wheel (350mm, suede), and a full carbon fiber dashboard overlay (Seibon CFRP) with a digital gauge cluster (AEM X-Series 30-0300)
